series_metadata.series_description: The Systems Integrator (SI) records document the mechanics (techniques and technology) for Ohio Medicaid Enterprise System (OMES) business modules to communicate data securely by receiving and transmitting transactions. The SI records shall include, but are not limited to, User Acceptance Testing materials, training materials, and other records created to support SI module.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copies of all project deliverables, artifacts, training materials and other non-system records, until scanned into machine readable format. Paper copies not scanned shall be kept for 7 years and then destroyed. ; Electronic: Three historical versions and one current version of machine readable formats of all project deliverables, artifacts, training materials and other non-system records should be maintained at any point of time, or 7 years, whichever comes first., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
